utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: No , I am sorry . It is just my foot itches like crazy .

emotion_cause.span: 1_It is just my foot itches like crazy .

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: Wow ! I usually get to know a girl a little better before I let her spoon me .

emotion_cause.span: 1_It is just my foot itches like crazy .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Relax , it is not like we are forking .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I usually get to know a girl a little better before I let her spoon me .
